name: linSetwakeupCondition
title: linSetwakeupCondition
description: Determines the conditions under which the LIN hardware can be reactivated (leaves the sleep mode).

parameters.name: numWakeupSignals
parameters.description: This parameter specifies the number of wakeup signals, after that the LIN hardware is reactivated. If the value 0 is set, the LIN hardware will never leave the sleep mode. Value range: 0..31 Default value: 1

parameters.name: forgetWupsAfterMS
parameters.description: This parameter defines the time after that earlier wake-up signals are not any longer taken into account for the wake-up behavior. Default value: 0

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

example.code:
// configure LIN hardware to wakeup after 3 wakeup signals
linSetWakeupCondition (3);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
